_schemaDescription: Risk Assessment – Entity Level sample payload. Entity: SecureCorp Innovations. 7 layers total, 7 scored. Categories: High Risk/Monthly (0 layers), Medium Risk/Quarterly (0 layers), Low Risk/Yearly (7 layers). 0 layers unscored. Control weakness derived from inherent × residual risk category per layer. Category labels and audit frequency mappings are client-configured (not hardcoded).

_controlWeaknessRef.Weak controls: Inherent High + Residual High — controls not reducing risk
_controlWeaknessRef.Strong controls: Inherent High + Residual Low — controls working well
_controlWeaknessRef.Low-risk area: Inherent Low + Residual Low — inherently low risk, well managed
_controlWeaknessRef.Control failure / anomaly: Inherent Low + Residual High — unexpected high residual despite low inherent risk

riskDistribution.description: 7 scored layers: 0 High Risk (Monthly), 0 Medium Risk (Quarterly), 7 Low Risk (Yearly). 0 layers unscored.

priorityLayers.description: Top 3 layers by residual score requiring immediate audit attention within SecureCorp Innovations.
